results.rendered_html:
sam-ā-√śvas P. -śvasiti, or -śvasati, to breathe again, recover breath, revive, take courage (often in 2. sg. Impv. -śvasihi, ‘take courage!’),  MBh. ;  Kāv.  &c.;
to trust or confide in (loc.),  MBh.  :
Caus. -śvāsayati, to cause to revive, reanimate, encourage, comfort, calm, console,  MBh. ;  R.  &c.

results.rendered_html:
samāśvas 2 P.
1 To take courage, take heart, calm or compose oneself.
2 To regain confidence.
3 To believe in.
— Caus. To console, encourage, cheer up.
